title: eriogonum umbellatum var. cladophorum
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. cladophorum, also known as Sulphur Flower Buckwheat, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. Its medicinal properties lie in its roots and stems, which contain flavonoids and alkaloids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Eriogonum umbellatum var. cladophorum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
